seoTitle: How to Upload Files in Microsoft Teams Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to upload, attach, and set permissions for files in Microsoft Teams chats and channels using OneDrive and SharePoint.
intro: Sharing a document in Teams goes beyond just dragging a file into a chat window, since where it's stored and who can access it depends on the context. This guide covers uploading files through the Actions and apps menu, understanding how private chats route to OneDrive while channel files go to SharePoint, and setting view or edit permissions. It's built for anyone who wants files to land in the right place with the right access level.

steps.heading: Open a chat or channel
steps.body: Navigate to your active team channel or a private group chat window in Microsoft Teams.

steps.heading: Open the attachment menu
steps.body: Click the Actions and apps plus button in the message compose section, then select Attach file.

steps.heading: Choose your file source
steps.body: Pick between uploading from your device or attaching a file already stored in the cloud.

steps.heading: Set permissions
steps.body: Use the file link permissions dropdown to configure whether recipients can view or edit the shared document.

steps.heading: Send and organize
steps.body: Add an optional message and send the file, or use the Shared tab to view organized asset libraries and drag-and-drop bulk uploads.

faq.question: Where do files shared in a private Teams chat get stored?
faq.answer: Files shared in a private one-on-one or group chat get stored in the sender's OneDrive, while channel files route to the team's SharePoint site.

faq.question: Can I control whether someone can edit a file I share?
faq.answer: Yes, the link permissions dropdown lets you configure whether recipients can only view, review, or actively edit the shared asset.

faq.question: Can I upload multiple files at once in Teams?
faq.answer: Yes, dragging and dropping files directly onto the chat window supports bulk uploads in one action.

faq.question: Where can I find all files shared in a channel?
faq.answer: The Shared tab at the top of a channel or chat gives you an organized view of every file that's been shared there.
